title: Change of business activity - Canada.ca
content:
## Change of business activity
As a self-employed individual, you may decide to change your business activity.
Whenever you change your business activity, you have to notify your tax services office. To find your office, go to Find a CRA address .
Some examples of changes to a business activity include:
- a home renovator decides to become a homebuilder
- a seamstress decides to sell clothing instead of doing repairs
- a hairdresser becomes a salon owner
- Business and industry
- Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada
- Related provincial and territorial government sites

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
